data.body: Why has uniformity declined? Public insurance in the U.S. is designed at the individual level: Children often qualify at higher income thresholds. Adults lag behind. This creates “patchwork” coverage within families.
data.author: did:plc:gmiekknm5h735sldbylfucip

data.body: Some quibble points: Our definition of uniformity is pretty basic, calling everyoneon medicaid, uniform. We could have some people on Medicaid managed care v s. traditional Medicaid, and we could further refine our measure of uniformity.
data.author: did:plc:gmiekknm5h735sldbylfucip
